claim_text: Malta’s Tourism Future Hinges on Long-Haul Flights Says Ian Borg
atomic_claim: Over 98% of Malta's visitors reach the island by air
speaker: Ian Borg — Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister
evidence_target: NSO tourism statistics, Malta Tourism Authority records, airport arrival data

claim_text: Watch: ‘Fuel Prices  Have Doubled’ Thomas Bajada Urges EU To Support Struggling Fishermen
atomic_claim: In Malta the price of fuel has doubled
speaker: Thomas Bajada
evidence_target: NSO fuel price statistics, Central Bank of Malta energy price data, timeframe unspecified but context suggests recent period

claim_text: No election announcement yet as Labour congress comes to a close
speaker: Robert Abela
evidence_target: Government gazette, Budget 2022 document, Ministry of Finance records

claim_text: Proposed tourism regulations ‘a meaningful first step’ – Malta Chamber
